text_preview:
SCADA Standards Appendix A 
HFC AWTP Master Plan 
Howard F. Curren AWTP 
SCADA Standards Appendix A ­
Definitions and General Reference 
January 2025 
147
artifact_summary: Reference table listing SCADA equipment tags for sluice gates, wetwell levels, and pump pressures within the HFC AWTP Master Plan.
artifact_blurb: This document serves as a technical reference appendix for the HFC Advanced Water Treatment Plant (AWTP) Master Plan. It provides a structured lookup guide mapping specific SCADA system tags to physical infrastructure components, including sluice gate actuators, wetwell level sensors, and pump pressure transmitters, facilitating accurate system diagnostics and maintenance.
